lede: A look at September 1 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including An Yu-jin and Mats Zuccarello, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Iraq War
events.desc: Iraq War: The United States Armed Forces transfers control of Anbar Province to the Iraqi Armed Forces.

events.title: Cold War
events.desc: Cold War: Korean Air Lines Flight 007 is shot down by a Soviet jet fighter after the commercial aircraft strayed into Soviet airspace, killing all 269 on board, including Congressman Lawrence McDonald.

events.title: 1969 Libyan revolution
events.desc: A coup in Libya brings Muammar Gaddafi to power.

events.title: Great Hinckley Fire
events.desc: Over 400 people die in the Great Hinckley Fire, a forest fire in Hinckley, Minnesota.

events.title: American Civil War
events.desc: American Civil War: Confederate forces under General Stonewall Jackson inflict heavy casualties in the Battle of Chantilly during the Union withdrawal from the Northern Virginia campaign.

events.title: Carrington Event
events.desc: Carrington Event started - the most intense geomagnetic storm in recorded history.

events.title: Order of St. Gregory the Great
events.desc: The Order of St. Gregory the Great is established by Pope Gregory XVI of the Vatican State to recognize high support for the Vatican or for the Pope, by a man or a woman, and not necessarily a Roman Catholic.

events.title: Battle of Tippermuir
events.desc: Battle of Tippermuir: James Graham, 1st Marquess of Montrose defeats the Earl of Wemyss's Covenanters, reviving the Royalist cause.

events.title: Guru Granth Sahib
events.desc: Adi Granth, now known as Guru Granth Sahib, the holy scripture of Sikhs, is first installed at Harmandir Sahib.

events.title: Lund Cathedral
events.desc: The main altar of Lund Cathedral, at the time the seat of the archiepiscopal see of all the Nordic countries, is consecrated.

births.name: Abdrabbuh Mansour Hadi
births.line: Yemeni general and politician, 2nd President of Yemen (died 2026)

deaths.text: Margaret Mary Vojtko, American linguist and academic
Ahmed Kuftaro, Syrian religious leader, Grand Mufti of Syria
Frederick Russell Burnham, American soldier and adventurer

observances.text: Christian feast day: David Pendleton Oakerhater (Anglican Communion)
